title: Don't Starve 4(Reborn)
description: Add a lot of easy to obtain food.
body:
This mod added a lot of food to prevent Steve from starving.

There is no need to worry about starvation!

The food in this mod is easier to obtain compared to other food modules.

You can use this mod to improve your diet, as these foods are very easy to obtain.

This mod has added foods such as roast bamboo, crushed sugarcane, roast wheat seeds, roast watermelon seeds, roast pumpkin seeds, etc.

This mod version 1.0.0-1.2.3 need [Json Things](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/json-things) and Miencraft Forge 1.18 - 1.20.1 or NeoForge 1.20.1 1.20.4 1.20.6 - 1.21.1 1.21.4 and [Starve Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/starve-library)).

This mod version 1.3.0+ is reborn version,need Minecraft Forge 1.20-1.20.4(1.3.0)1.20/1.20.1(1.3.1).1.3.1+ version also need [Recipes API](https://www.mcmod.cn/download/22044.html).

This mod is still in testing and may have many bugs.

Attention: This mod has no relations with the computer game ＂Don't Starve＂.

3rd edition:[DontStarve3](https://modrinth.com/mod/dt3).

Reborn edition:[Don't Starve: Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/dontstarvereborn).

Moss edition:[Don't Starve: Moss Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/dontstarve-moss-edition)

Links:[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dontstarve4) [mcmod](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/19582.html).
